title: Sales Rockstar — Young Dynamic Team
narrative: Looking for a young, energetic sales ninja to join our gentleman's club of top performers. Must be a digital native (recent grad preferred). Must be able to lift 30 lbs and stand for long periods. We prefer native English speakers, US citizens only. Seeking a salesman (not saleswoman). What was your previous salary? Tell us about your family medical history. Must have no criminal history. No EEO statement. Bachelor's degree required (no equivalents accepted).
